title: What do you think Anno does with all of his Evangelion money
display_title: What do you think Anno does with all of his Evangelion money
wikitext:
[]: What do you think Anno does with all of his Evangelion money             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 10:54 am You've all had the question at least once or twice. Now, the time has come to spread these ideas out into the open! What do you think Anno does with his cash? Personally, I think he eats it for breakfast and is currently building a 1:1 scale Evangelion entirely out of cash.

[]:             Quote Post by Ambrosia » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:26 pm I think he uses it to wipe his bottom after going to the loo. Or maybe he smokes money joints.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:27 pm Buying Sailor Moon doujinshi. Lots and lots of Sailor Moon doujinshi.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:27 pm Ambrosia wrote: I think he uses it to wipe his bottom after going to the loo. Or maybe he smokes money joints.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:32 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: solid diamond horses for each of his ex-wives.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:33 pm No, not diamonds carved into the shape of a horse; I mean actual living horses that are made out of diamonds. This is the story that I have heard told.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:40 pm Clearly he is using it to fund the construction of his very own Geofront. Inside which he will recreate NERV HQ as a secret underground animation company which launches New Eva based Releases into the streets of the city above via giant, discretely created elevators. Finally, when he's milked the franchise for all its worth and perfectly recreated all that he has designed, he will use the excess funds to buy Tokyo, rename it Tokyo-3 and sink the rest into Genetic research to recreate the angels and the Eva series. At this time the hideous plan will finally be realised, while we all thought it was just an insane franchise Anno was actually giving us forewarning of his organisation's evil plan as he goes ahead and shows off the word SEELE 01 tattoo'ed on his butt and brings Instrumentality to the world. Failing this insanity, he clearly uses it for drugs, how else would he create more Eva merch'?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:42 pm Lance of LoL wrote: Clearly he is using it to fund the construction of his very own Geofront. Inside which he will recreate NERV HQ as a secret underground animation company which launches New Eva based Releases into the streets of the city above via giant, discretely created elevators. Finally, when he's milked the franchise for all its worth and perfectly recreated all that he has designed, he will use the excess funds to buy Tokyo, rename it Tokyo-3 and sink the rest into Genetic research to recreate the angels and the Eva series. At this time the hideous plan will finally be realised, while we all thought it was just an insane franchise Anno was actually giving us forewarning of his organisation's evil plan as he goes ahead and shows off the word SEELE 01 tattoo'ed on his butt and brings Instrumentality to the world. Failing this insanity, he clearly uses it for drugs, how else would he create more Eva merch'?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:45 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: This is the story that I have heard told.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 12:47 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Anno doesn't have any ex-wives. Until Moyoco claimed him, he was just another ronery otaku.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:14 pm I think it sits in a pile in a corner of his residence. I wouldn't be surprised if Anno is one of those rich people who feels guilty about their success. Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: If this is so, then what does Anno talk about at the end of episode 25', when he thanks the "three women" involved in the makings of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:14 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: If this is so, then what does Anno talk about at the end of episode 25', when he thanks the "three women" involved in the makings of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:31 pm Women and cocaine.

[]:             Quote Post by Gob Hobblin » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:36 pm Fireball wrote: Women and cocaine.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Jan 13, 2013 1:43 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Neither one of those are frivolous enough. I have heard tell that he uses the money to purchase solid diamond horses for each of his ex-wives.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:21 pm Anno probably doesn't feel guilty about the money but it's well known he doesn't simply care much for it (so before Rebuild started I wouldn't be surprised if most of it was just pooling in his bank accounts). It played no big part in his life or interests, just like food. There was that one book written about him in late 90s that spent time wondering about his habits of sleeping in trains and not giving fuck about money or food* *Anno actually gaining some sort of interest in food later was reflected in Rebuild 2.0's food motifs and in interview he IIRC attributed the change in him to his wife. C.A.P. wrote: Buying Sailor Moon doujinshi. Lots and lots of Sailor Moon doujinshi.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:32 pm Lance of LoL wrote: Clearly he is using it to fund the construction of his very own Geofront. Inside which he will recreate NERV HQ as a secret underground animation company which launches New Eva based Releases into the streets of the city above via giant, discretely created elevators. Finally, when he's milked the franchise for all its worth and perfectly recreated all that he has designed, he will use the excess funds to buy Tokyo, rename it Tokyo-3 and sink the rest into Genetic research to recreate the angels and the Eva series. At this time the hideous plan will finally be realised, while we all thought it was just an insane franchise Anno was actually giving us forewarning of his organisation's evil plan as he goes ahead and shows off the word SEELE 01 tattoo'ed on his butt and brings Instrumentality to the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:37 pm Xard wrote: Oh and he also bought tickets to Zeta Gundam films and nerd raged mightily afterwards

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:54 pm Fireball wrote: In what way?

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Sun Jan 13, 2013 2:57 pm I think a good portion of his money went into founding Khara, so it's safe to assume he invests in making more anime.
summary:
[]: What do you think Anno does with all of his Evangelion money             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jan 13, 2013 10:54 am You've all had the question at least once or twice. Now, the time has come to spread these ideas out into the open! What do you think Anno does with his cash? Personally, I think he eats it for breakfast and is currently building a 1:1 scale Evangelion entirely out of cash.
